sentences: where object query q provides a prediction center in normalized form by a sigmoid activation function after two layers of <ENT_074>.
These predicted centers are un-normalized to obtain the input image’s center coordinates <MATH_067> and <MATH_068> .
The object query also estimates the object scales as <MATH_069> and <MATH_070> .
After the prediction of the object scale and center, <ENT_072> provides a Gaussian-like weight map as follows:

where <MATH_071> is the hyperparameter to regulate the bandwidth, and <MATH_072> is the spatial parameter of weight map W. It provides high attention to spatial locations closer to the center and low attention to spatial locations away from the center.
